assumptions_used: Production capacity not stated in abstract (kept intentionally vague pending CFO confirmation of plant scale)
GHG reduction percentages (55-70% by 2030, 80-90% by 2035) are based on Italy NECP grid trajectory (CLM-026); formal GHG calculation to be confirmed in Section 2 and the GHG calculator annex
Financial close within 24 months and entry into operation within 48 months are project targets, not yet confirmed by FID or financing agreements
open_issues: Exact production capacity (t/yr) not included in abstract — should be inserted once confirmed by user/CFO team
Absolute GHG avoidance figure (tCO2eq over 10 years) not included — should be added once GHG calculator is complete to strengthen the impact statement
Grant amount not stated — could be referenced if confirmed

Innovation Fund Part A character limit should be confirmed against the final version of the application form downloaded from the Portal Submission System (form version V5.0 – 01.12.2025 states 2000 characters for Part A abstract)
